title: HORIZON-MSCA-2026-PF-01 Postdoctoral Fellowships
summary: MSCA PF 2026 call supporting researcher mobility and postdoctoral projects, with a reported 399.05 million EUR budget and links to ERA Fellowships for widening countries.
reality_check: High-fit route for incoming and outgoing postdocs at UJF, including Euratom-relevant areas, but success depends on strong candidate-host pairing and early proposal shaping.
action_note: Highest-priority active window for immediate candidate scouting and proposal shaping.

title: ERC Advanced Grant 2026
summary: Frontier-research funding for established principal investigators with a strong track record and ambitious scientific vision.
reality_check: Expected to open on 28 May 2026 and effectively restricted to truly exceptional senior PIs; do not treat as a speculative broad call.

title: Horizon Europe Research Infrastructures 2026
summary: Active Horizon Europe Research Infrastructures 2026 calls covering RI consolidation, next-generation scientific instrumentation, tools, methods, digitalisation, and data/EOSC services.
reality_check: Very short fuse before the 16 June deadline; the next-generation instrumentation/tools/methods/digitalisation topic is especially relevant and is reported with a 110 million EUR budget.
action_note: Treat as short-fuse: proceed only with already mature RI partners and a clear UJF role.

title: HORIZON-EURATOM-2026-01
summary: Open Euratom 2026-2027 agenda for fission, nuclear safety, radiation protection, nuclear materials, non-power applications, radioisotopes, and nuclear skills.
reality_check: Core thematic fit for UJF; programme budget is about 330 million EUR, with about 108 million EUR for fission, safety, and radiation protection, but proposals need mature European consortia.

title: DIGITAL Europe Large-Scale Pilots for AI and GenAI in Medical Imaging
summary: Digital Europe call line for large-scale deployment pilots of AI and GenAI tools in medical imaging workflows.
reality_check: Relevant mainly through clinical and data-hub partnerships; UJF impact is strongest when positioned on physics-informed methods and validation.

title: TA CR SIGMA - Applied Research for Public Needs
summary: National applied research support for consortia solving practical public-sector or societal needs with measurable outputs.
reality_check: Open and potentially relevant, but the practical chance stays low without a concrete implementation or industry-facing partner and a deliverable beyond basic research.

title: OP JAK - Top Research
summary: Large-scale Czech calls aimed at research excellence, capacity building, and development of major scientific teams and infrastructure.
reality_check: Relevant for institutional growth, but this is mainly a planned institutional track that needs internal prioritization long before launch.

title: GA CR Postdoc Individual Fellowship
summary: Individual postdoctoral funding scheme in the Czech Republic.
reality_check: Worth watching as an expected individual route for incoming candidates, but it still depends on a very strong applicant profile and confirmed call timing.

title: OP JAK - Vyzkumne infrastruktury II
summary: Planned OP JAK call for modernization and development of large research infrastructures, expected around October/November 2026 with a planned allocation of 1.9 billion CZK.
reality_check: Potentially crucial for UJF if it has a recognized large-RI role or a concrete modernization package; otherwise only an institutional watchlist item.

title: OP TAK - Aplikace: mezinarodni spoluprace
summary: OP TAK call supporting industrial research and experimental development in international cooperation.
reality_check: Partner-only opportunity for UJF in practice; proceed only with a clear business-driven industrial research or experimental-development case and at least one foreign partner.

title: OP TAK - Partnerstvi znalostniho transferu IV
summary: OP TAK knowledge-transfer call for company-research cooperation, with up to 12 million CZK eligible costs and a required knowledge-transfer assistant.
reality_check: Useful for detector, measurement, and material-process transfer, but not a good route for purely basic research without a concrete company use case.

title: OP JAK - Teaming-CZ III
summary: OP JAK Teaming-CZ III supports development of excellent research centres linked to successful Horizon Europe Teaming pipelines.
reality_check: Very high institutional fit only if UJF is already in a qualifying Teaming for Excellence pipeline; otherwise feasibility is effectively low.

title: OP JAK - MSCA Fellowships CZ
summary: Czech OP JAK route for high-quality MSCA fellowship proposals that were highly rated but not funded at EU level.
reality_check: Use as a complementary route for strong MSCA Seal or near-miss proposals; OP JAK reports insufficient available allocation, so newly accepted applications may go to a reserve list after evaluation.

title: OP JAK - Open Science III
summary: Planned OP JAK Open Science III call expected around June/July 2026 with a planned allocation of 500 million CZK.
reality_check: Relevant for UJF data, EOSC, FAIR, DMP, repositories, and institutional data governance; still a planned call.

title: OP JAK - Vyzkumne e-infrastruktury II
summary: Planned OP JAK call for research e-infrastructures, expected around November 2026 with a planned allocation of 600 million CZK.
reality_check: Relevant only through clear e-infrastructure, data, HPC, or service-provider links; otherwise partner-level monitoring.

title: MSMT - Program EXCELENCE
summary: Expected MSMT programme for strengthening excellent research teams and institutional research capacity.
reality_check: Strategically relevant, but the report did not find a final public call text; treat as monitoring until full competition documents are published.

title: GA CR - Swiss-Czech Lead Agency Projects 2027
summary: GA CR Lead Agency route for Swiss-Czech basic-research projects, with SNSF deadline on 1 October 2026 and Czech submission due by 8 October 2026.
reality_check: High fit for physics, materials, space, and nuclear experiments where a Swiss PI and coherent joint proposal already exist.

title: HORIZON-MSCA-2026-DN Doctoral Networks
summary: MSCA Doctoral Networks 2026 call for international doctoral training consortia, opening on 28 May 2026 with a reported 593.03 million EUR budget.
reality_check: Strong strategic fit for UJF doctoral pipelines in nuclear data, detectors, radio-pharmaceuticals, radiation protection, and space instrumentation, but requires a mature training consortium.

title: IAEA CRP F23037 - Radiation-Induced Structural Changes in Polymers
summary: IAEA coordinated research project on data-driven prediction of radiation-induced structural changes in polymers.
reality_check: Good fit for materials-in-radiation expertise, but CRP budgets and proposal details need checking on the individual IAEA record.

title: IAEA CRP I31037 - Numerical Simulation of STELLA-2 Transient Experiments
summary: IAEA coordinated research project on numerical simulation of transient experiments at STELLA-2.
reality_check: Relevant for nuclear-safety modelling groups, with feasibility depending on specific modelling capacity and experiment alignment.

title: IAEA CRP I31043 - V&V of Design Tools for Molten Salt Reactors
summary: IAEA coordinated research project on experimental testing for verification and validation of molten-salt-reactor design tools.
reality_check: High fit for safety and experimental-validation capacity, but participation should be checked against the detailed CRP technical scope.

title: IAEA CRP I31042 - Ex-Vessel Corium Cooling
summary: IAEA coordinated research project on ex-vessel corium cooling from PIRT to accident management.
reality_check: Strong fit for severe-accident and safety expertise, but less relevant for teams focused only on basic nuclear physics.

title: JRC EMMA 2026 Access Calls - SMPA, AMALIA and MCL
summary: JRC EMMA access calls provide in-kind access to SMPA, AMALIA, and MCL laboratories relevant to nuclear materials, corrosion, ageing, and micro-characterisation.
reality_check: Very short deadline and not a classic grant; valuable only with a sharply defined nuclear-materials access case.
source_label: JRC Open Access to Research Infrastructures

title: AV CR 05/2026 - Podpora cinnosti pracovist AV CR
summary: Main AV CR internal support call for institute activities, covering instruments such as Praemium Academiae, Lumina quaeruntur, ERC-in, PPLZ, DSc., Wichterle, Akademie budoucnosti, AV21, and regional cooperation.
reality_check: Main AV CR envelope for UJF planning: new requests are due 12 October, change requests 26 November, and circuit 6 by 8 December 2026; run one internal harvest across PA, LQ, ERC-in, PPLZ, Akademie budoucnosti, AV21, and mobility.
action_note: Prepare a single PČP harvest instead of collecting candidates at the last minute.

title: AV CR - Akademie budoucnosti 2026
summary: AV CR career-support instrument for junior and senior research stays, good-practice exchange, and returns after career breaks.
reality_check: High practical value for UJF because it can be used through internal institute selection; collect concrete stay and return candidates early.

title: AV CR ERC-in - Podpora predkladatelu projektu ERC
summary: AV CR support for employees preparing ERC proposals, including mentoring, consultations, interview preparation, and related costs.
reality_check: Small-budget but high-leverage route for building a disciplined ERC pipeline at UJF; useful only for PIs with a realistic ERC profile.

title: AV CR - Lumina quaeruntur 2026
summary: AV CR excellence instrument for developing an independent scientific team and research programme.
reality_check: Potentially strong fit for UJF only where there is a candidate with a clear independent programme, international profile, and institute co-financing capacity.

title: AV CR - Praemium Academiae 2026
summary: AV CR elite support for outstanding senior researchers and their directly related scientific activity.
reality_check: Use only for genuinely exceptional senior PI candidates; this is not a broad group-leader support tool.

title: AV CR PPLZ - Postdoktorandi 2026
summary: AV CR PPLZ postdoctoral support for early-career researchers at AV CR institutes.
reality_check: Practical personnel-pipeline tool for UJF postdocs shortly after Ph.D.; strongest when tied to a concrete research plan and host group.

title: AV CR - Strategie AV21 2026
summary: AV CR strategic programme platform with 15 running programmes in 2026 and selection of four new programmes expected for financing from 2027.
reality_check: Use through AV21 programme logic rather than as a normal grant; strongest UJF angles are space, nuclear technologies, radiation safety, data, and medical applications.

title: AV CR - Regionalni spoluprace 2026
summary: AV CR regional cooperation line for projects with concrete regional or local partners.
reality_check: Relevant for UJF only when there is a real regional partner and applied case, such as radiation monitoring or environmental measurement.

title: AV CR Mobility Plus - projects from 2027
summary: AV CR Mobility Plus call for bilateral and partner-country projects starting in 2027, including partners such as Taiwan, Bulgaria, France/CNRS, India, Germany/DAAD, Japan/JSPS, China/NSFC, Slovakia/SAV, and Turkey/TUBITAK.
reality_check: Short deadline and practical fit for targeted international cooperation; collect partner, topic, added value, and follow-on grant logic immediately.
action_note: Collect UJF project intents within one week; treat as the only new urgent AV CR action item.

title: TA CR SIGMA DC4 - Bilateral Cooperation 2026
summary: TA CR SIGMA DC4 bilateral applied-research competition with 250 million CZK allocation plus 40 million CZK for nuclear-energy cooperation.
reality_check: High practical fit for applied UJF topics, but the main applicant must be a company; UJF can participate only as another participant.

title: Horizon Europe Space 2026
summary: Horizon Europe Space 2026 call window with topics relevant to space instrumentation, radiation-hard components, space data, and irradiation test facilities.
reality_check: Strong UJF fit where radiation testing, detectors, EEE components, or high-energy irradiation facilities match a mature European consortium.

title: TA CR DOPRAVA 2030 - 4th Public Competition
summary: TA CR DOPRAVA 2030 competition for transport R&D, with reported 400 million CZK allocation and up to 30 million CZK per project.
reality_check: Not a core UJF call; use only for a real transport, aviation, safety, sensor, or materials use case without forcing the topic.

title: TA CR SIGMA DC2 - Industrial Chairs 2026
summary: Expected TA CR SIGMA DC2 Industrial Chairs call in 3Q 2026, reportedly for 60-84 month projects up to 42 million CZK and max 60% aid intensity.
reality_check: A/B watchlist only if UJF can anchor a strategic industrial partner and attract or apply a high-level expert.

title: AZV / EP PerMed CARMEN2026 Widening
summary: EP PerMed CARMEN2026 widening route where Czech teams may join a successful first-stage consortium for full proposals.
reality_check: Very narrow UJF fit; consider only with a real medical, radiobiology, or personalised-medicine consortium link.

title: ERC Proof of Concept 2026
summary: ERC Proof of Concept cutoff for validating or preparing use of results from eligible ERC grants.
reality_check: Relevant only if UJF has an eligible current or recent ERC result with credible validation or exploitation potential.

title: ERC Plus Grant 2026 Watchlist
summary: Expected new ERC Plus Grant scheme for exceptionally strong PIs, reportedly up to 7 million EUR for 4-7 years.
reality_check: Strategically interesting but extremely selective; track only for a genuinely top UJF candidate.

title: COST Open Call 2026
summary: COST Open Call for research networking actions, expected from 31 July to 28 October 2026.
reality_check: Does not fund research itself, but is useful for building networks before Horizon, Euratom, or applied consortia.

title: EIC Transition 2026
summary: EIC Transition 2026 supports maturation and validation of technologies based on eligible EU-funded results, with grants up to about 2.5 million EUR.
reality_check: Relevant for commercialisable UJF instrumentation, detectors, software, or spin-off logic only if there is an eligible prior EU result.

title: EIC Pathfinder Challenges 2026
summary: EIC Pathfinder Challenges 2026 are topic-gated calls for high-risk deep-tech research.
reality_check: Track only if a published challenge directly matches UJF technologies; Pathfinder Open has already passed.

title: Eurostars Call 11
summary: Eurostars Call 11 is expected for SME-led international R&D projects from 9 July to 10 September 2026.
reality_check: Relevant only with an SME lead and market-oriented development case; UJF would normally be a research partner.
